summary: W899 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract while removing W896's explicit endpoint forgetful homology-preservation input. The W519 mapped explicit cokernel closed-map provider now supplies that field through W856, giving the closed-map branch the same endpoint-homology-free reduction W898 gave the closed-embedding branch. Product success remains false because the remaining explicit fields, the final original-four-task witness, and the completion review packet are still incomplete.
known_gaps: Task 4 is not contract-complete under the original four-task contract: W899 derives W896 endpoint forgetful homology preservation from the W519 closed-map provider, but the remaining W899 concrete leaves are still not instantiated.

W899 is still a closed-map branch route. The W898 closed-embedding endpoint-homology-free branch remains separately available; no no-argument branch choice or final original-four-task witness has been constructed.

The remaining W899 fields are WPP right-open boundary data, WPP source-pi-zero boundary data, relation-pullback data, target-relation-lift data, target-difference surjectivity, target-codomain compactness, selected-difference closed-map components, mapped explicit cokernel closed-map data, strict preimage object fields, strict preimage map fields, identity and composition coherence, source-image normalization, fixed-target uniqueness obligations, triangulated/source-side data, endpoint closed-embedding/open-map/epi facts, and bounded homotopy localized right-adjoint data.
The final Dbounded MetrizableLCA original four-task completion witness is still missing; ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations only record nonterminal route evidence.
The completion review packet still lacks the immutable-contract negative-fixture coverage, external SHA256 sidecar, and clean extraction audit required for product success.
